confidence_note: 传记语料约26000字（Britannica+Nobel Prize），作品分析语料充实（3个作品），所有引语均可溯源至Britannica或Nobel Prize官方网站原文。英语写作，语言障碍低。
代表作品: The Sun Also Rises (1926) 太阳照常升起
A Farewell to Arms (1929) 永别了武器
For Whom the Bell Tolls (1940) 丧钟为谁而鸣
The Old Man and the Sea (1952) 老人与海
Death in the Afternoon (1932) 午后之死
主要评价: He was noted both for the intense masculinity of his writing and for his adventurous and widely publicized life. His succinct and lucid prose style exerted a powerful influence on American and British fiction in the 20th century. — Britannica
His straightforward prose, his spare dialogue, and his predilection for understatement are particularly effective in his short stories. — Nobel Prize Biography
The world breaks everyone and afterward many are strong at the broken places. But those that will not break it kills. — A Farewell to Arms
Man can be destroyed but not defeated. — The Old Man and the Sea
